title: Infosys Announces Expansion of Mohali Development Center
detailed_summary: Infosys announced the expansion of its Mohali Development Center with a new integrated development campus in Mohali, North India. The planned expansion includes a new Software Development Block and supporting facilities with approximately 350,000 square feet of built-up area and seating capacity for about 3,000 employees. Infosys said the expansion will strengthen its ability to design, co-create, and deploy AI-led solutions at enterprise scale, while enhancing capabilities in cloud, AI, application development, and digital transformation.

key_facts.fact: Infosys announced the expansion of its Mohali Development Center with a formal groundbreaking ceremony held at the campus.
key_facts.section_heading: Infosys Announces Expansion of Mohali Development Center

key_facts.fact: The expansion is planned to include a new Software Development Block along with supporting facilities.

key_facts.fact: Current operations at Infosys Mohali have close to 1,000 employees and deliver advanced digital services to global clients across Banking, Financial Services and Insurance, Retail, and Healthcare.

esg_or_csr_items.item: Infosys said the Mohali expansion will include a high-efficiency building, 100% wastewater recycling using Membrane Bioreactor technology, green landscaping, eco-friendly construction materials, and smart building technologies.
